items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement that an email copy is auto-sent to the signatory. However, there is no concrete evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms this functionality or any related API reads. The absence of evidence regarding the email notification process indicates that the validation is blocked due to insufficient information to assert a hard requirement failure.
